title: Domestic Relations
content:
There was a young man of Dunbar,
     Who playfully poisoned his Ma;
        When he'd finished his work,
        He remarked with a smirk,
     "This will cause quite a family jar."
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Domestic Relations"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
